chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-3941 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For order on Misc. No.16159/2025 (Urgency) 2. For order on office objection Nos.1 to 4 3. For order on Misc. No.16160/2025 (Exemption) 4. For hearing of main case 12.8.2025 Mr. Rafique Ahmed advocate for the petitioner -------------------------------- 1. Urgent application is allowed. 2-5. The main grievance of the petitioner is that his departmental inquiry is being unduly delayed. He was issued a show cause notice on 27.11.2024 and has submitted a reply to the same. He has also been called for personal hearing. The petitioner is directed to fully cooperate with the inquiry. Learned counsel for the petitioner states that he will be satisfied if the Chief Secretary Sindh completes the inquiry in accordance with law within four months of the date of this order. Order accordingly. A copy of this order shall be sent to the Chief Secretary Sindh, for compliance. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms alongwith listed applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
